'''鈭歨-b-t''' ('''habata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neal|neal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neal|neal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| habata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:habatithi|habatithi]] || [[word:habatiji|habatiji]] || [[word:habatishi|habatishi]] || [[word:habati|habati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:habatuthuth|habatuthuth]] || [[word:habatujuj|habatujuj]] || [[word:habatushush|habatushush]] || [[word:habat|habat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:habatuthu|habatuthu]] || [[word:habatuju|habatuju]] || [[word:habatushu|habatushu]] || [[word:habatu|habatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:habatufuth|habatufuth]] || [[word:habatufuj|habatufuj]] || [[word:habatufush|habatufush]] || [[word:habatuf|habatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:habatethe|habatethe]] || [[word:habateje|habateje]] || [[word:habateshe|habateshe]] || [[word:habate|habate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:habatothoth|habatothoth]] || [[word:habatojoj|habatojoj]] || [[word:habatoshosh|habatoshosh]] || [[word:habat|habat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:habatotho|habatotho]] || [[word:habatojo|habatojo]] || [[word:habatosho|habatosho]] || [[word:habato|habato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:habatofoth|habatofoth]] || [[word:habatofoj|habatofoj]] || [[word:habatofosh|habatofosh]] || [[word:habatof|habatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:habat忙th忙|habat忙th忙]] || [[word:habat忙j忙|habat忙j忙]] || [[word:habat忙sh忙|habat忙sh忙]] || [[word:habat忙|habat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:habatathath|habatathath]] || [[word:habatajaj|habatajaj]] || [[word:habatashash|habatashash]] || [[word:habat|habat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habatatha|habatatha]] || [[word:habataja|habataja]] || [[word:habatasha|habatasha]] || [[word:habata|habata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habatafath|habatafath]] || [[word:habatafaj|habatafaj]] || [[word:habatafash|habatafash]] || [[word:habataf|habataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:habatasha|habatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohabatasha|gohabatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihabatasha|gokihabatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:habatn眉sha|habatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohabatnkn眉sha|gohabatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihabatn眉sha|gokihabatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:habatsh毛sha|habatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohabatnksh毛sha|gohabatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihabatsh毛sha|gokihabatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:habatrosha|habatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabatnkrosha|gohabatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabatrosha|gokihabatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:habatmusha|habatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabatnkmusha|gohabatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabatmusha|gokihabatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:habatsherasha|habatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohabatnksherasha|gohabatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihabatsherasha|gokihabatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:habatngasha|habatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohabatnkngasha|gohabatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihabatngasha|gokihabatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:habatyasha|habatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohabatnkyasha|gohabatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihabatyasha|gokihabatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:habatyamasha|habatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohabatnkyamasha|gohabatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihabatyamasha|gokihabatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:habatn眉sh毛sha|habatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabatnkn眉sh毛sha|gohabatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihabatn眉sh毛sha|gokihabatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:habatn眉rosha|habatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabatnkn眉rosha|gohabatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabatn眉rosha|gokihabatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:habatn眉musha|habatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabatnkn眉musha|gohabatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabatn眉musha|gokihabatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:habatsh毛n眉sha|habatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabatnksh毛n眉sha|gohabatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabatsh毛n眉sha|gokihabatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:habatsh毛rosha|habatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabatnksh毛rosha|gohabatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabatsh毛rosha|gokihabatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:habatsh毛musha|habatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabatnksh毛musha|gohabatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabatsh毛musha|gokihabatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:habatron眉sha|habatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabatnkron眉sha|gohabatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabatron眉sha|gokihabatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:habatrosh毛sha|habatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabatnkrosh毛sha|gohabatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihabatrosh毛sha|gokihabatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:habatromusha|habatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohabatnkromusha|gohabatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihabatromusha|gokihabatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:habatmun眉sha|habatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohabatnkmun眉sha|gohabatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihabatmun眉sha|gokihabatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:habatmush毛sha|habatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohabatnkmush毛sha|gohabatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihabatmush毛sha|gokihabatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:habatmurosha|habatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohabatnkmurosha|gohabatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihabatmurosha|gokihabatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:habat|habat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:h忙b忙t|h忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohabat|hohabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoh忙b忙t|hoh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohabat|hohohabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoh忙b忙t|hohoh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉habat|n眉habat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉h忙b忙t|n眉h忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉habat|n眉n眉habat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉h忙b忙t|n眉n眉h忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂habat|n茂habat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂h忙b忙t|n茂h忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂habat|n茂n茂habat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂h忙b忙t|n茂n茂h忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhabat|luhabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luh忙b忙t|luh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhabat|luluhabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluh忙b忙t|luluh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihabat|lihabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lih忙b忙t|lih忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihabat|lilihabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilih忙b忙t|lilih忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohabat|kohabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koh忙b忙t|koh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohabat|kokohabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoh忙b忙t|kokoh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehabat|kehabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keh忙b忙t|keh忙b忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehabat|kekehabat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeh忙b忙t|kekeh忙b忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
